name: PJ Masks
description: Three kids become nighttime superheroes and solve small city problems caused by “villains” (usually other kids doing naughty things). Clear right/wrong without gore; conflicts are solved with gadgets, planning, and apologies (not real violence).
notes:
Not for Dante yet.
To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.
YouTube option exists, but it may not be separated by seasons.

name: K-Pop Demon Hunters
description: Animated musical action film about K-pop superstars who secretly hunt demons. Contains action/violence and is better for older kids/teens.
notes:
Too early for Dante; I wouldn't choose it. If he already loves it, OK.
Better with Vanya/Hirja: learn the songs together and explain the story/lyrics.

name: Sonic Boom
description: Fast, funny Sonic series (no horror). Sonic and friends stop Dr. Eggman’s silly robot plans; action is short and cartoonish (not realistic).
notes: Already a known character. Cartoon violence only; try if he likes it.

name: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
description: Final chapter of the trilogy: Hiccup and Toothless discover the Hidden World and face their biggest challenge. Themes: friendship, responsibility, letting go.
notes: Not watched yet. To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
description: A 2025 entry listed under the How to Train Your Dragon name. Content, runtime, and exact version may vary by source.
notes: Not watched yet. If you want it in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: How to Train Your Dragon
description: A young Viking named Hiccup befriends a dragon (Toothless) and challenges his village’s traditions. Teaches empathy, friendship, and understanding differences.
notes: Not watched yet. To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: How to Train Your Dragon 2
description: Hiccup and Toothless discover a hidden ice cave and face a dangerous dragon hunter. Themes: family, growing up, courage.
notes: Not watched yet. To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: Alphablocks
description: Short educational episodes that teach phonics, letter sounds, early reading, and simple word building.
notes:
Try daily.
If he resists, do 1–2 short clips as a warm-up, then allow another show.
Goal: build letters/sounds vocabulary in English.

name: Jingle Jangle: A Christmas Journey
description: Family musical fantasy about an inventor and his family. Good for getting used to full-length movies.
notes:
Not sure he'll like it, but try sometimes so he gets used to the movie format.
To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: Moana
description: An island girl goes on an ocean quest with a demigod to restore a stolen heart. A few monsters and a lava demon, but violence is mild and stylized; lots of music and beautiful animation.
notes: To watch in English: change the player and select English audio.

name: Encanto
description: A magical family in a living house; everyone has a gift except Mirabel, who feels left out. Almost no fighting; tension is mostly emotional (family arguments, house cracking).
notes: Watched once; he didn't like it.
